title: Volcano Job
description: Schema for the Volcano Job (vcjob) custom resource definition. A Volcano Job defines a batch workload with multiple task types, lifecycle policies, gang scheduling requirements, plugin integration, and queue assignment for Kubernetes batch processing.

apiVersion.description: API version of the Volcano Job resource.

JobSpec.description: Specification of a Volcano Job defining workload structure, tasks, scheduling requirements, and lifecycle policies.

schedulerName.description: Name of the scheduler responsible for this job. Defaults to 'volcano'.

minAvailable.description: Minimum number of pods that must be schedulable simultaneously for gang scheduling. If fewer pods are available, none are scheduled.

tasks.description: List of task groups composing the job. Each task defines a pod template, replica count, and task-level policies.

policies.description: Job-level lifecycle policies controlling how the job reacts to events like pod failures or completions.

plugins.description: Map of plugin names to argument arrays. Plugins inject environment variables and sidecar containers for ML frameworks. Common plugins include 'tensorflow', 'pytorch', 'mpi', 'svc', and 'env'.

queue.description: Name of the Volcano Queue to submit this job to. Determines scheduling priority and resource quota constraints.

priorityClassName.description: Kubernetes PriorityClass name controlling this job's scheduling priority.

maxRetry.description: Maximum number of retry attempts before the job is permanently failed.

ttlSecondsAfterFinished.description: Seconds after completion before the job is automatically garbage-collected. Omit to disable automatic cleanup.

runningDuration.description: Maximum allowed running duration for the job (e.g. '2h', '30m'). Job is terminated if it exceeds this duration.

volumes.description: Volumes to be mounted into job task containers.

TaskSpec.description: A named task group within a Volcano Job, defining a set of pods with a shared pod template and optional task-level policies.

name.description: Unique name of the task within the job. Used to reference the task in plugins and dependencies.

replicas.description: Number of pod replicas for this task.

template.description: Kubernetes pod template spec for pods in this task.

policies.description: Lifecycle policies for this task, overriding job-level policies for events affecting this task's pods.

topologyPolicy.description: NUMA topology policy for resource allocation. Controls how CPU and memory are assigned relative to NUMA nodes.

maxRetry.description: Maximum retry attempts for this task before it is marked as failed.

dependsOn.description: Task dependency configuration controlling execution order within the job.

name.description: Names of tasks that must successfully complete before this task starts.

LifecyclePolicy.description: A lifecycle policy rule defining an automated action to take when a specific event occurs during job or task execution.

action.description: Action to execute when the policy condition is met.

event.description: Single event type that triggers this policy.

events.description: Multiple event types that each independently trigger this policy.

exitCode.description: Container exit code that triggers this policy when a pod exits with this code.

timeout.description: Duration after which the policy fires if the triggering condition persists.

JobStatus.description: Observed status of a Volcano Job including its lifecycle phase, retry count, and per-task pod counts.

state.description: Current phase and transition details of the job.

phase.description: Current lifecycle phase of the job.

reason.description: Machine-readable reason for the current phase.

message.description: Human-readable description of the current state.

lastTransitionTime.description: Timestamp of the most recent phase transition.

minAvailable.description: Minimum pod count required for this job.

retryCount.description: Number of times the job has been retried so far.

runningDuration.description: Duration the job has been in the Running phase.

taskStatusCount.description: Per-task breakdown of pod counts by Kubernetes pod phase.

phase.description: Map of Kubernetes pod phase names to pod counts.

conditions.description: Detailed conditions describing the current state of the job.

name.description: Name of the job, unique within its namespace.

labels.description: Labels for organizing and selecting the job.
